goal: 按 P0/P1 review 并修复 Mainline skill 集成

summary.title: 按 P0/P1 收紧 Mainline skill 集成
summary.what: 按 P0/P1 对 Mainline skill 与 agent guidance 做了一轮 agent-facing review 并补齐缺口：扩展 skill frontmatter 和 Trigger Policy 的 autonomy/stop-line 触发词；补强 .data.agent_authority、max_autonomy、inspect_or_stop 的决策规则；明确 review 只能推非 main 分支且不能 merge/release；补齐 SealResult schema guard、PR publish/body 路径、stub 的 --json 命令；同步 README 和中英文 reference 的 agent loop 到 preflight 入口；将 AGENTS managed block 升级到 v24。
summary.why: 原先改动已经覆盖 stop-line 主路径，但 dogfood 前还需要从 P0/P1 角度确保 agent 能在真实任务中加载 skill、读对 JSON 路径、遵守团队 max_autonomy 和 current-instruction override、正确处理 inspect_or_stop/overlap、在 review 边界只走非 main PR 路径，并且使用可提交的 seal/PR 命令形态。
summary.user_goal: 按 P0/P1 review 并修复 Mainline skill 集成

decisions.chose: 把本次修复限定在 P0/P1 的 agent-facing contract：skill discovery、stop-line 决策、PR/非 main 边界、seal schema、template/docs 一致性
decisions.rationale: 用户准备随后 dogfood，最需要先消除会导致 agent 误触发、越权推进、写错 seal schema 或用错 PR body 的高价值缺口。

decisions.chose: 明确 current instruction 只能在 team max_autonomy 内抬高边界，merge/release/post-merge cleanup 仍是显式 delivery task
decisions.rationale: 这样保留 stop-line 模型，避免退化成权限矩阵，同时防止 agent 把一次性用户措辞写进配置或越过团队上限。

decisions.chose: 要求先检查 named findings/overlaps；语义真实冲突才跑 mainline check 或询问，人为判断非冲突时写入 append/seal
decisions.rationale: preflight block 应阻止静默推进，但不应把低置信、互补或已理解的 overlap 变成无法继续的死锁。

decisions.chose: 在 skill、AGENTS 模板和轻量 managed block 中明确 review 可推非 main 分支并停在 PR，绝不授权 push main、merge 或 release
decisions.rationale: 这条是 stop-line 行为的安全边界，需要在 agent 实际会读到的多个入口都一致表达。

decisions.chose: 在 skill 中补充 decisions/rejected/api_changes/data_model_changes 的对象数组形态，并让 stub/README/reference 使用 --json 命令形态
decisions.rationale: 这降低 agent 手写 seal payload 时把对象数组写成字符串数组或使用非 JSON 命令路径的概率。

decisions.chose: 保留并强化 int_7e059249 的 PR description marker 协议；采用与 int_2653a0c2 互补的 SealResult schema guard；AGENTS.md 仅更新 Mainline-managed block，不改 int_9b78be92 的 repo-specific docs 方向
decisions.rationale: 三个 preflight overlap 都是同一 agent guidance 表面的相邻或互补工作，不是语义互斥。

rejected.alternative: 把 P0/P1 review 写成单独文档而不改 skill/template
rejected.reason: dogfood 依赖 agent 实际加载的 SKILL.md、AGENTS 模板和 README/reference 入口；只写 review 结论不能改变后续 agent 行为。

rejected.alternative: 把 auto-submit 场景展开成完整权限矩阵
rejected.reason: 此前设计已收敛到 assist/handoff/review stop-line 模型；继续扩展矩阵会降低可用性并增加 drift。

review_notes: Focused verification: git diff --check; go run . agents check --json; go test ./internal/engine -run 'TestAgents' -count=1; npx --yes skills add ./skills/mainline --skill mainline --agent codex claude-code cursor --global --yes --list.
Before commit, a broader targeted engine test also passed: go test ./internal/engine -run 'TestAgents|TestDefaultSkillInstallCommandIsNonInteractive|TestInitWritesConfigAndIdentity' -count=1.

mainline preflight still reports proposed overlaps with int_1b0ff97a, int_2653a0c2, int_7e059249, and int_9b78be92. They were inspected and treated as follow-up/adjacent agent guidance work, not semantic conflicts.

architectural_claims: Mainline agent guidance treats the skill surface, AGENTS managed templates, and install/update documentation as the agent-facing contract for stop-line behavior.
Team max_autonomy is a ceiling over current-instruction overrides; merge/release/post-merge cleanup remain explicit delivery tasks, not autonomy levels.
Review autonomy is constrained to non-main branch push plus opened/updated PR and never authorizes pushing main.
behavioral_changes: Agents are more likely to trigger the Mainline skill for agent_authority, max_autonomy, inspect_or_stop, opened_pr, auto-submit, and PR description wording.
Agents are instructed to inspect named preflight overlaps before lifecycle advancement and to record non-conflict judgments instead of silently ignoring blocks.
Generated AGENTS guidance now points review autonomy at non-main PR boundaries and warns against main pushes/merge/release.
README/reference agent loops now start with mainline preflight --json and use --json for start/append/seal commands.
security_implications: Reduces the chance that an agent pushes main or proceeds to merge/release under review autonomy.
migration_notes: AGENTS managed template version bumped to 24; run mainline agents update to refresh repo guidance.
Existing global Mainline skill installs still need npx --yes skills update mainline --global --yes or the matching skills add command.
